headline: GOP Demands Crypto Capital Rule Clarity Within 30 Days

article.title: Senate Republicans push finance watchdogs to clarify crypto capital rules
article.summary: Senator Cynthia Lummis has led a group of lawmakers urging financial regulators for “fair capital treatment for on-balance sheet treatment of digital assets.”

headline: Dems Alone Oppose $1B Crypto Trust Charter Bid

article.title: Comptroller says only Democrats pressuring over crypto trust charter
article.summary: US Comptroller of the Currency Jonathan Gould and New York Representative Gregory Meeks sparred over Donald Trump’s influence on regulators he has nominated as president at a Thursday oversight hearing.

headline: US Futures Plummet 2% as AI Rally Fades

article.title: US Futures, Korean Stocks Drop as AI Mania Fades: Markets Wrap
article.summary: US equity-index futures declined along with Asian stocks as enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade cooled after driving markets to record highs this year.

headline: India Waives Taxes on $10B Bond Investments Suddenly

article.title: India Scraps Taxes to Attract Foreign Investment in Bonds
article.summary: India cut taxes on bond investments by foreign institutional investors to attract overseas capital and stabilize the rupee which has been under pressure from higher energy prices and equity market outflows.

headline: AI Develops AI, Crypto Plunges 10% Overnight

article.title: AI Is Already Developing AI, Says Anthropic—And Humans May Be Slowing Things Down
article.summary: Anthropic says AI now writes most of its code and runs increasingly complex research tasks, leaving people to decide which problems are worth solving.

headline: Congress eyes $1B crypto market regulation today

article.summary: Rep. Bryan Steil said he'll add language to the House congressional stock ban bill to cover prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi.
